body_txt: Age is all in the mind. Well, for some people, anyway. Most of us will likely get grumpy , perv erted , or past our prime and will end up trying anything in order to look younger . But then, there are those who get better as they age; the ones who still qualify for the 'desirable' tag, even when they're grandparents. These men and women have maintained their dashing good looks, class, and sex appeal despite — or because of — their greying hair. Each becomes a Silver Fox or, if female, a Silver Vixen. A Silver Fox is an attractive, distinguished older (generally over 50) person, often noted for their sexy silver or white hair along with their good looks and charm. Note that this trope is only applicable to characters that look visibly old — immortal or ageless characters and characters who are Older Than They Look and resemble young people despite their age don't count. Characters who live much longer than normal humans but are nonetheless past middle age by their species' standard do count, so long as they're both visibly old and attractive by human standards. For the manga, go here . Not to Be Confused with either Gray Fox or actual silver foxes . For attractive characters that are associated with foxes, or are literal foxes, see Foxy Vixen . noreallife
